title: Close out epic e7c: run epic retro and write the roadmap completion report
description: Meta-work tick (orchestrator-owned). e7c is the FINAL epic in the soft-ordering roadmap (4bt -> o16 -> e7c), so this close-out is retro-only — there is no next epic to flesh out. Run the epic-close retro per references/claude-runner.md, promote/record learnings in .tick/learnings.md, then write the roadmap completion report and yield to the human (two-tier stopping rule: the roadmap end is the hard stop). Include in the report: whether the e7c->o16 edge should retroactively have been an after edge, as a real-world datapoint on the preference-vs-dependency distinction this roadmap shipped.
acceptance_criteria: retro run and learnings recorded per claude-runner.md; roadmap completion report written; e7c closed
